title: [Aikido] Fix 8 security issues in systeminformation, fastify, pino and 3 more

similarOrDuplicatePRs.title: [Aikido] Fix security issue in fast-xml-parser via minor version upgrade from 5.3.4 to 5.3.8

summary: Automated security bot PR that upgrades dependencies in the observability/_examples/otel-bridge/agent-hub/ example project to patch 8 CVEs. Bumps systeminformation 5.30.3→5.31.0 (2 HIGH command injection CVEs), fastify 5.6.0→5.7.3 (HIGH validation bypass + LOW DoS), pino 9.11.0→10.1.1 (MEDIUM prototype pollution), ajv 8.17.1→8.18.0 (LOW ReDoS), minimatch 10.1.1→10.2.1 (LOW ReDoS), and replaces @isaacs/brace-expansion with brace-expansion (LOW DoS). Only touches package.json and pnpm-lock.yaml in an examples subfolder.
maintainerNotes: Changes are scoped entirely to observability/_examples/ which is an isolated example project. The Lint CI check is failing — likely a lockfile or formatting issue that may need a quick fix. Previous Aikido PRs (e.g. #13699, #12853, #12898) have been merged successfully. The pino bump is a major version change (9→10) which could have breaking changes in the example, but since this is only an example project the risk is low. The changeset check is skipped which is appropriate for example-only changes. Consider merging after verifying the lint failure is unrelated or trivially fixable.
